items.titolo: ChatGPT di nuovo in tribunale: "cultura tossica di menzogne"
This easy prompt trick gave me better AI-generated images - no matter the model
items.descrizione: Having trouble getting the right image out of ChatGPT, Gemini, or another AI tool? Try this foolproof prompt.

items.titolo: I set 10 honesty traps for Claude Opus 4.8 - and a legal test broke it
items.descrizione: I tested Opus 4.8 against 4.7 using coding, medical, finance, and legal traps, then cross-checked the results with multiple AIs.
